title: Creamy Indian Blackeye Pea Dal
description: A fatty, creamy, and light Indian dish featuring blackeye peas, featuring layers of flavor and a paleo-friendly twist.
instructions: Heat oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add onion and saut4e until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add garlic and saut4e for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add ginger and stir for 1 minute.
Add turmeric, cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper; stir for 1 minute.
Add blackeye peas and stir to combine.
Add broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until peas are tender.
